Record Class CookingRecipe

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.recipe.CookingRecipe
Record Components:
id - unique recipe identifier from recipes.yml
ingredients - ordered list of ingredient specs; 1–5 entries
cookTime - time in ticks required to complete this recipe
output - the ItemStack produced when cooking completes
public record CookingRecipe(String id, List<IngredientSpec> ingredients, int cookTime, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack output) extends Record
Represents a single cooking recipe.

A recipe specifies up to five ingredients (matched as an unordered multiset), a cook time in ticks, and the ItemStack produced on completion.

  • Constructor Details

    • CookingRecipe

      public CookingRecipe(String id, List<IngredientSpec> ingredients, int cookTime, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack output)
      Creates an instance of a CookingRecipe record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      ingredients - the value for the ingredients record component
      cookTime - the value for the cookTime record component
      output - the value for the output record component

  • Method Details

    • matches

      public boolean matches(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack[] slots)
      Returns true if the given ingredient slots satisfy this recipe.

      Matching is a multiset comparison: each non-null/non-air slot item must match exactly one unmatched ingredient spec, and every spec must be matched by exactly one slot. Slots beyond the recipe's ingredient count must be empty.

      Parameters:
      slots - the contents of the five ingredient slots (length must be 5)
      Returns:
      true if the slots contain exactly the right items for this recipe

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
